title: calicotome spinosa var. villosa
intro: Calicotome spinosa var. villosa, also known as the spiny broom or broom thorn, is a thorny shrub native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as a diuretic. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving kidney function, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Herbal preparations of Calicotome spinosa var. villosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support urinary health and alleviate symptoms of kidney stones.
